After taking them in, whether or not you were excited or eager to, nevertheless, you treated them with hospitality, you gave them a place to stay, you gave them food for the evening, conversations were had, information was passed around, and a handful of you, upon listening in on some of the conversations and pushing for information with the eldest of them, Uncle Ogden, discovered some sort of true purpose as to why they came to Whitestone, dealing with, apparently, a long-running blood curse that lies in the Trickfoot family. And Ogden, having visions, had, along with the rest of the family that takes care of him, made their way towards Whitestone as the information gathered by JB Trickfoot, the esteemed keeper of knowledge about your journey over the past year or so, and the exploits of her cousin, Pike, has told you. So, that being the case, you've promised them a tour of the grounds, and, perhaps, seeking more information about what the next steps are in regarding this curse, if there are any. So, with that, you all finish your evening. Eating of your meals, drinking deep of your cups, and eventually finding yourselves resting 'til the night took you and sleep was had. The morning comes, you wake up rested, and the day is yours. What do you wish to do?

preceding_turns.text: All right. I'm actually going to send you on that one, since you have the broom. We'll need two. I'll find a feather. All right. I'm going to just take a quill, basically, and stick it in there. I don't even care.

preceding_turns.text: That's 18.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: After looking around for a minute, he leans into you and goes, "Pike, we need to talk. I've been tying together the missing pieces of our history for most of my life. This information has helped me once before, and as I'm sure has been discussed at length with your friends, there is a curse upon this bloodline. My research has brought me some knowledge, and I've been able to cast this curse out of one Trickfoot before, but I failed once before that. And I miss her to this day. Do you want to know the history of our curse?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do you know where we are?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No idea."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: This is a shrine of Sarenrae, who I follow, and I wanted to bring you here because I wanted to share it with you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Thank you. It's very peaceful."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) How are you feeling?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "That warms my heart, and to hear you say that, maybe one day I will be, as well, before my time is up."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, this is something that I'll have to think about. We'll have to talk about it with everybody else, especially if it involves them, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course. Take your time. They're about-- JB? JB, how close are we to the full moon?" He's shouting out into nothing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I do a nature check--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're not there.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do I know?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a nature check.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Nature check?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nature check.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Get it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Let me find a d20. Oh, ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're not sure. You're not very involved or invested in the cycles of the moon.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You know, I could talk to Keyleth about that. She would know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: And thank you for telling me all of this.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Thank you for being so kind to family that you owe nothing to."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm very grateful that you're here, and even though our last name has a reputation, I'm proud to be a Trickfoot.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Yeah, I should go." You join up with Pike and Ogden. You guys reconvene, now. It's getting later in the day, dusk is taking. What do you wish to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, how can Pike be at risk, then?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That seems odd.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She's one of the most generous people I've ever known.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Unless she's doing things that we don't know about.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No. (laughs) No. It's Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I know. That's why I'm worried."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, your narrative was crude and the language not at all descriptive, but I think we have the building blocks to work with here for something that we could turn into, you know, like an essay. An essay of some sort.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: A good short book with a lot of drawings--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Not a book, not a book at all, nope.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: -- leather cover with embossing on it or something quite lovely.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't think it would be thick enough for that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Gold filigree, probably, something just very beautiful.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: A pamphlet, maybe. A big pamphlet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's nodding. "All right, yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We'll work on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Let's head back.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 25. Four days.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, what about a second opinion? Like one time it was really burning when I was peeing, and the guy's like, oh, eat this and it'll be fine, and I was like, mm, I'm gonna get a second opinion.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That was cranberry juice, Grog, and that was a solid opinion.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, it actually turned out to be true.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's a very good analogy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What if we do this  what if we go up to the mountain, full moon, go through the motions, and Keyleth, you're super-powerful, you must have some sort of way of telling if this Ogden is telling the truth, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Um. I could look at his face and his weird tics and deduce very hard.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Talk to his tics. Does he have tics?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: When is the next full moon?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a nature check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I remembering that incorrectly?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So maybe just try to cure yourself of this curse. Is that possible?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Pushing close to dusk.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I have no idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Like, do you get tentacles?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's-- I feel like that would be an upgrade.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's not really that bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No. I doubt that's what it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we're approaching this the wrong way.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm intrigued by this mind-reading serum.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I've never used it, so it should probably work great.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How much was that?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: About a thousand.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's not bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, maybe Ogden just isn't telling you things because he's so old, it's locked away and he doesn't remember. You know?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we just have to ask?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I would check both of them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: All of them. And Astra.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How long does it last?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I can only, I think, investigate one person-- or gnome-- at a time, but then I can move the spell to other people. Let me-- Doty, give me my notes on the spell that I took. Hold on.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What time is it right now?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You can cut off about half a day's travel, about a day's worth of travel, I guess.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The Dawn Table.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's a rock shelf used for prayer when the spring rolls around. A lot of fishermen go there and leave offerings. It's meant to bring-- I wouldn't say a good harvest, but a good season for catching fish and trying to bring food back to Whitestone, so that's pretty high up. It's gonna be probably about two and a half days' travel on foot.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: But we can carpet or teleport.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you have a way of getting there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are there trees nearby? Are there trees nearby?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll see if I can recall if there's a tree nearby.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That part of the mountain is pretty-- they do have trees, but the trees are pretty thin. They're like pine tree, that wide at the most, and you need a pretty thick tree to Transport Via Plants.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can get us close.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We can certainly get closer.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It moves pretty quick. 300 feet. Flying speed of 300, which is ten times as fast as you walk. And without-- going straight up the mountain, you could make the full journey, talking with Percy about this, from the base of the mountain to the Dawn Table in about two hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's not really horse-accessible.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We'll be fine, Tary.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm worried about the big guy.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The big guy will be fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I guess he can just walk.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He can cloud-stride as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, no, Doty can't mist-form, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can Trinket and Doty ride in your--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, Doty, I've tried to put him in the--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: One of us, in theory, should actually perhaps take the carpet so we can put Doty on the carpet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm sitting on the carpet right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How heavy is Doty?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let me look at Matt's statistics.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Doty technically counts as a creature, though it is, much like a golem or a construct of some kind, it would be considered a creature. It is a construct. So in theory, you would have to tell Doty, "Doty, turn into wind." And that probably would work.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I could do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It would take a slot out of our ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How fast does this cloud thing move?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It lasts for eight hours, so you'll be using most of the duration to get there, you could probably fly back if you want to, or tree-stride back if you had a tree you could find up there to do it. So yeah, you could do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We wouldn't even need the tree-stride, to be honest, we could just do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, from here to the base of the mountain?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I mean, we could do from the base of the mountain to the top in two hours, three hours, but we could make the entire journey quite quickly.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So she could just double-cast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The entire journey you could make in about six and a half hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Solid. So some people go up, you come back, turn the rest of the people in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: With my tree-stride.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Without tree-stride.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: With the gas.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's go glamping.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Let's go glamping. But as long as I can sleep afterwards.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We'll bring tents, we're going to bring some nice tents.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Four days, all right. That gives us time to prepare. I need a few things for this ritual."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So what do you do? You go and gather up the other Trickfoots? You approach the rest of them, Ogden, JB.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're not leaving tonight, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Whenever you guys want to?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Tonight? This is the same night we got back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, right, it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: In the morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, we'll leave in the morning, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: At dawn, we leave.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: So I'll go to them at dinner. Okay, so we've had some discussions and I think it'll take us a little bit of time to get up there and do whatever setting-up you need to do on the top of the mountain, so we were thinking, if you guys are okay with this, of leaving tomorrow morning.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can see Johann and Astra kind of turn over to Ogden. Ogden goes, "Yes, that would be perfect. When is the next full moon?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's in four days.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah. Within a short time, as the evening draws in, it's not a full moon, but it's still a very big moonlit night and you find in Syngorn one of the larger temples to the Moonweaver, there's a night guide there named Nusem, and it's the temple of the Pale Light. And so, as you approach him and give your request, he's like, "A jug of our blessed water, that is an unusual request. We take no money, but offerings in trade of equal value as you honestly see fit."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He started leaving them around the house.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: He calls them sachets.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so you guys go to bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I go to Syngorn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I attune to my blood axe instead of the thrower before I go to sleep?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That you can.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to let the castle know I'm taking a brief, brief run up the hill and grabbing supplies for this, so letting everyone know. Grabbing a few tents.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They have supplies for you at the ready. You gather them easily from the Pale Guard. They have some tents that haven't been used for a while, you take those with you. Supplies are given. You head to Syngorn. Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I should probably have brought someone with me just in case I suck at this. That's cocked. That's cocked if I've ever seen cocked.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's good. That's a good one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Investigation. 20.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: And with that, with the supplies gathered, the rest of you all have the spell commence, and you are able to concentrate for a minute to turn your physical form into that of a white, cloud-like mist. You watch as the gnomes do so, and this is the first time you're doing this as well, Taryon, and it's a unique experience. You're about as giddy internally that you cannot express it through word because you are a cloud of mist. But you watch as the smaller gnome mists also kind of appear and some of them start swirling around excitedly, and one of them just seems to drift.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Why don't you guys start off on the rug?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you know what, you can tree-stride us through, and then you guys head up and then we'll just meet you up there on the broom.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That is a good idea. That's what I'll do. I'll tree-stride some through.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Just me and Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, easy enough to do. You've seen these woods, or the perimeter of the woods, at least, so you know vaguely a tree in the direction that Percy points you towards. So with that, you touch the edge of the Sun Tree, the exterior of it opens into a doorway, and through that-- (laughs) The trust-fall that is Percival and Vex rushing through the Sun Tree before it closes behind. You trust that they are at the destination required and will meet you there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll meet you there!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It closes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Lock the door!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Following towards the path which Percival pointed you guys. So. This is about a six-plus-hour journey as you're coasting over the entirety of the Parchwood Forest. And it is beautiful, it's actually not too cloudy today. You've come past Winter's Crest, it's been a few weeks since.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll meet you there!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It closes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Lock the door!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And with that, with the supplies gathered, the rest of you all have the spell commence, and you are able to concentrate for a minute to turn your physical form into that of a white, cloud-like mist. You watch as the gnomes do so, and this is the first time you're doing this as well, Taryon, and it's a unique experience. You're about as giddy internally that you cannot express it through word because you are a cloud of mist. But you watch as the smaller gnome mists also kind of appear and some of them start swirling around excitedly, and one of them just seems to drift.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Oh no. Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of the other ones comes by and cuts it off and shows the direction. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Eventually you guys start making your way--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's sleeping.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (snoring)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Sorry. Vex and Percy. Five years of this, and let this be a lesson for when you name your characters for your campaign. As you guys approach, you all condense back into your mist form, except for the four other clouds that are all circling and circling.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Really?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Vex and Percy.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Not yet, you guys are just making your way there. You do notice, the rock archway looks both ancient and very well-constructed, and it's impressive that even though the erosion and the nature of the strong, cliffside winds that come up there, it's kept as well as it has. You also see a number of long-rotted baskets and sacks and dried, decomposing fruits and fish bones. You can see where basically the remnants of different offerings were left up here as part of the Pelor blessing to the fishermen that walk through the Salted Bluffs. Eventually, Vex and Percival make their way up here as well, and you guys are now, full journey, about midafternoon, with three days until the full moon.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Right on the edge, looking down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But there's a large stone archway there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are you wearing your armor?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I am, yeah. We left, we packed up. Some thoughts I just have inside my head.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are me and Percy there yet?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. So you guys have a few days here to relax, get to know each other, ask questions and hear stories about young Pike, embarrasingly. Get to tell them of the tales of what you guys have done, and inform them from a firsthand basis of what Vox Machina has accomplished for the past few years. They all seem enraptured, JB more than anybody, and she seems to almost finish some of the tales. You get the sense that she's been very, very well-versed in what you guys have done and is genuinely invested in the stories as they happen. Anything else you guys want to accomplish in the three days in particular?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Three days to kill.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hey. That cliff's really high.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, time to pitch a tent and make it fabulous.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's not do the ritual site right next to that cliff.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's a great idea. Is there a way to move it sort of--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: -- inward?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can move back a bit, yeah. The bluff itself is maybe about 70 feet from one side to the other. It's flat. So you can move it further back towards this edge of the cliff, as opposed to being the one that's seaside.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Yeah.

preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Yeah.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. So you guys have a few days here to relax, get to know each other, ask questions and hear stories about young Pike, embarrasingly. Get to tell them of the tales of what you guys have done, and inform them from a firsthand basis of what Vox Machina has accomplished for the past few years. They all seem enraptured, JB more than anybody, and she seems to almost finish some of the tales. You get the sense that she's been very, very well-versed in what you guys have done and is genuinely invested in the stories as they happen. Anything else you guys want to accomplish in the three days in particular?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Three days to kill.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hey. That cliff's really high.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, time to pitch a tent and make it fabulous.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's not do the ritual site right next to that cliff.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's a great idea. Is there a way to move it sort of--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: -- inward?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can move back a bit, yeah. The bluff itself is maybe about 70 feet from one side to the other. It's flat. So you can move it further back towards this edge of the cliff, as opposed to being the one that's seaside.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Yeah.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Not on a camp. For yourself, maybe. And it helps you-- it allows you-- your ability to camouflage elements of your space allows you to help and use your stealth for this whole endeavor. But two days go by, harpies don't seem to pay mind. There's a couple of close calls where a couple fly overhead, but you all see them coming and get low and tell the gnomes to go inside, and get behind the rocks, and they seem to pass without actually noticing your presence.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, they took all our horses.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep. They picked them apart last time you first made your way to Whitestone. So you're very careful to make sure that whatever camp you set up is camouflaged as best as possible. Since that is one of your specialties as a ranger, it's not too bad. Go ahead and make a stealth check, please. This will be your stealth check for the camp.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I can't cast Pass Without a Trace?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not on your camp.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, probably not.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Come on, rogue.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'll say, for the purposes of that, no.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do I-- (laughs) I'm scared to ask it. Okay. What am I rolling? What am I adding?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Add your stealth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But would I have used my-- what is that shit? Hide in Plain Sight? Could I have used that?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Eventually, you make your way to the fourth day, and the sun begins to set. preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not on your camp.

preceding_turns.text: Not on a camp. For yourself, maybe. preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's good, that's good.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Sure. And actually, this is a point as well, because part of this was supposed to be hallowed ground, which requires the Hallow spell, which is a 24-hour casting period. Or, let me see the actual casting time on that. You would know this, and he would have spoken to you in advance to do this, so we'll say, yeah, Hallow, its casting time is 24 hours. The herbs and oils and incense required to do this one alone costs 1,000 gold, which the spell consumes, so that's 1,000 gold you have to mark off to do this.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's weird, the blue light makes it almost-- I can't even see what it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's hard to see with the blue light.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Is it really? That's a problem.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's okay, we'll figure it out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It could be this monitor. I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so. Here are the gnomes, clustered.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Matt, in preparation for this ritual, I would like to cast-- can Doty use an item that I cast magic into?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Doty cannot, I believe.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well, then I'll cast Revivify into one of my coins and give it to Vex and say, use this on me if I fall. Oh, and also, I'll give her my five Needle Arrows that I made.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What are these?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They're just regular arrows that have a +1 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Badass.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So just a little extra accuracy.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Tary, you just keep surprising me.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're worth it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: With Ogden saying they're ready, can I just be alone in the tent for a second?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, that ends Grog's turn. It is now the creature's turn. It's going to move, moving upwards and trying to catch up to Pike. But, because of the nature of the Hallowed ground, it gets that far and then stops and is held in place.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Minus five. That's gonna miss. That's 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18. You hit, go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, really? 18 hit? Okay. Shit. 36. 36 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you add your necrotic?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nope. Sorry, I haven't used the blood axe in a while. 39 points of damage. Three points of necrotic.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That Great Weapon Master, man.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I know. That's why I wanted the blood axe back. Missed it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You swing with the second strike. This time, you watch as some of the faces implode at the impact, and you see a flash of dark matter just get strung out about three or four feet from it as you strike through, and it (shrieks) gives a horrible scream in pain as it does so.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that's it. No bonus action.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're not going Frenzied?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I figured you were since you usually are. Unless you don't want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What just happened?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Pardon me, buddy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Trinket just became a ghost.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What's going on?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Don't! No! No! No!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Don't you look, Travis!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do it, Travis!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Travis Willingham, you're going to get in big trouble!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Step back! Step back!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Draw dick-butts all over it

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Trinket's a ghost!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That ends-- that's the end of your turn, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's the end of my turn. I moved-- that was my full movement to get up there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you can move.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want to move over back towards the edge of that rock towards me. I mean, this way--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This way?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This way?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Closer to the gnomes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Closer to the gnomes. Okay. Well, since I left my-- imagine you're flying for this one. I left my pillars at Force Grey. So. I'm going to have those back.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh! Am I flying?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "She didn't! And yet, we came to offer you nothing but a fantastical story of redemption and the healing of a family, and you got to know your cousin who you've not spoken to since you left."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Is he still in the ball?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, he's still in the ball.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Push him out further.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Doty, just hold him over the edge.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Doty goes and-- "Tary." "No-no-no!" He's now looking down at the sphere of force below him and looking down to the waves crashing at the very, very small, distant shore. "You can have the diamond back! It's just--"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What's the play here? What's the game? What were you trying to get? Not that diamond. There's more to it than that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Look. We don't have a lot. You have plenty. We hear of all the great deeds you've done. All the dragons you've killed. All the vast amounts of money and gold you've procured the past couple years of your adventures. And we get sent a measly sum! A small hint of nothing but a paltry pinch."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: She didn't have to send you anything, you dick!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The sphere dissipates. It's been a minute. And he goes (screams) and just plummets off the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What's the play here? What's the game? What were you trying to get? Not that diamond. There's more to it than that.

preceding_turns.text: "She didn't! And yet, we came to offer you nothing but a fantastical story of redemption and the healing of a family, and you got to know your cousin who you've not spoken to since you left."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I trusted you. I put myself out there and I trusted you.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: (squeals) "We've been following that man because he is-- He's my dad. And we're really broke. And we blew through all the money you sent us very quickly. I mean, come on. How much do you guys got? Like ten thousand gold? That's more than we'll see in our lifetime. Drop in the bucket. Changed our life. You would have been fine! You would have been great! You wouldn't have known any better. Our lives would have improved drastically. We would have gone our own way. But maybe stayed for a week! Made you dinner. But here we are. Are we bad? Are we evil? I don't think so. But that's up to you, Miss Priest." At this point, Astra's like, "Shh. Honey, honey! Just calm down." And he's like, "No! No-no-no-no. No. Okay. She can think she's better than us, that's fine. You want to fight the Trickfoot name, that's great. You're still a Trick--"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't have to be.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That's all I know."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: But you're very smart. I think there's more for you in this life than you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can see now, she's just tears now, at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to walk over to Johann and Astra.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Yeah, they've let the invisibility down at this point. They're both just entangled. "Oh! There's some sort of misunderstanding here. We were under the impression that there was a terrible curse."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: "Money?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No! No! We-- Look. Look! Okay. Look, we have been following--"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I tighten the grasp on them.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You wait another few minutes. It's a long flight up at this point without the Haste. I mean, the winds do help a little bit, because the winds are hitting the cliff and heading upwards. So the updraft does help a bit, but it takes about five or six minutes or so for him to eventually get his way back up to the top. Probably longer than that, even. Then eventually you watch as Vax returns and drops an unconscious, unmoving Ogden onto the rocky cliffside floor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And I go, and down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He hits the ground and all you hear is muffled, "But she's still one of us." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And Astra goes, "You did kind of drop a mace on my toe."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I know. That was on purpose.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah, I gathered as much."

preceding_turns.text: Oh! I'm so mad!

preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.text: Don't rush it. Don't rush it.

preceding_turns.text: Where's Ogden?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you make your way back to Castle Whitestone with JB, we'll pick up that next time, as it's getting really late, and you can't really beat a button like that on an episode. Jesus. All right, guys. We're going to end tonight's session there. Thank you so much for watching. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Read loud and clear, Percival."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I release a low charge of Diplomacy right into him. Just so we're clear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (panting) "Crystal."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Excellent.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well-- despite circumstances, and given that there's no reason to be false, it strangely has been a pleasure to meet you all. And Pike, it's good to see you doing so well for yourself. Come! We're leaving!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, and Johann!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Johann's like, "Uh, yes?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Stay away from those sweets.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: There actually is a curse on our family. It's called diabetes. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: So watch out.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Holy shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: There it is!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And with that, the rest of the Trickfoot family begins to make their long, meandering way down the mountainside, leaving you guys there.

preceding_turns.text: You dropped a grenade, man. (laughing)
